Claim:InterviewFlowType_Agent.description: Interview is running in Agent flow (PAA 2.0).

Claim:InterviewFlowType_Consumer.description: Interview is running in Consumer flow (HQX 2.0).

Claim:NewQuote_True.description: This is a new quote (not retrieved). Absent = quote was retrieved.

Claim:QuoteRetrieved_True.description: This quote was retrieved (not new). Opposite of NewQuote_True.

Claim:SourceKeyword_MPQ3.description: Quote originated from the MPQ3 source.

Claim:PreDefinedPackage_True.description: CovMod active for this carrier and state.

Claim:SinglePackage_True.description: Only one package submission is running.

Claim:PackageType_Basic.description: Current submission is the Basic package.

Claim:PackageType_Standard.description: Current submission is the Standard package.

Claim:PackageType_Premium.description: Current submission is the Premium package.

Claim:PackageType_Custom.description: Customized package; always sent with SinglePackage_True.

Claim:EditQuote_True.description: Quote is in edit mode (can be edited). If false, quote cannot be edited.

Claim:OwnerInfo_True.description: Section claim — not relevant for defaults/relevancy/validation analysis. Ignored.

Claim:InfoWeFoundExterior_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Exterior — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWeFoundTheBasics_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for TheBasics — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWeFoundTriage_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Triage — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWeFoundInterior_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Interior — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWeFoundOwners_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Owners — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWeFoundStructure_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Structure — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWeFoundUtilities_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Utilities — handled by code, not ODM/RE.

Claim:InfoWefoundTriage_True.description: Prefill vendor claim for Triage (lowercase variant) — handled by code.

Claim:QuoteScope_FQ.description: Rule applies to Full Quote stage only. Maps to AgentFQ/ConsumerFQ in RE FlowStages.

Claim:QuoteScope_Prebind.description: Rule applies to Prebind stage only. Maps to Prebind FlowStage in RE.

Claim:BusinessType_Personal.description: Personal lines business type — include in conditions.

Claim:SourceKeyword_MPQ3_Renters.description: MPQ3 source in Renters LOB context — quote originated from Progressive auto policy flow leading to home/renters quote. Include in conditions.

ViewMode.reason: ViewMode is always OFF. All ViewMode rules are excluded from output entirely — view-only display logic is not relevant for migration analysis.

ABTest-co-applicant-improvements.reason: A/B test always OFF. Expected behavior is A. No need to include in output.

DataDictionary.reason: DataDictionary rules excluded — handled separately. 70/75 fields also have non-DD rules.

Progressive_Interview.reason: Always true for Progressive. Rules with IS ENABLED=false do not apply to Progressive.

AMSuitDwellingFireSubmissionODM.reason: Always ON. IS ENABLED=false rules never fire — skip those files.

source_flags.note: These three flags form a mutually exclusive source identity matrix.

interpretation.ba_odysseyapi=false: Everything except PAA 2.0 (HQX 2.0, GetQuote, MPQ3, etc.)
interpretation.ba_LightApi=false: Everything except HQX 2.0 (PAA 2.0, GetQuote, MPQ3, etc.)
interpretation.ba_getquoteapi=false: Everything except GetQuote (PAA 2.0, HQX 2.0, MPQ3, etc.)
interpretation.ba_odysseyapi=false AND ba_getquoteapi=f: Not PAA 2.0 and not GetQuote (HQX 2.0, MPQ3, etc.)

ba_IWFnoAC-relevancy.reason: HQX 2.0 relevancy now controlled by UI, not ODM/RE. Cleanup candidate.

ba_df-consumer-hqx10.reason: Flag not found in LaunchDarkly — removed. All rules using IS ENABLED=true never fire. Treat as always FALSE.

ba_odysseyapi.reason: Source identity flag. ON = PAA 2.0 Agent. OFF = everything else.

ba_SSNRemovalForMPQ3.reason: Flag is OFF in all environments. Rules using IS ENABLED=true never fire.

ba_LightApi.reason: Source identity flag. ON = HQX 2.0 Consumer. OFF = everything else.

ba_getquoteapi.reason: Source identity flag. ON = GetQuote source. OFF = everything else. Evaluate per condition.

ba_Condo_Redesign.reason: IS ENABLED=false targets other tenants. In Progressive flag is ON so IS ENABLED=false rules don't apply.

ba_number-of-families.reason: Always ON in HQX 2.0. Treat as always true.

ba_abtest-naming-convention.reason: Always ON. Has two branches (true/false) but should be fixated to true. Cleanup candidate — remove flag and keep only the IS ENABLED=true branch logic.

ba_yearbuild-default-date.reason: Always ON. Only IS ENABLED=true rules fire.

ba_fl-carriertrue.reason: Always OFF. Only IS ENABLED=false rules fire.

ba_SSNRemoval.reason: Always ON. Only IS ENABLED=true rules fire.

ba_tmp_preference_redesign_cr618.reason: Always ON. Only IS ENABLED=true rules fire.

ba_exotic-ho6-1-0.reason: Always ON. Only IS ENABLED=true rules fire.

ba_optional-phone-number.reason: Always ON. Only IS ENABLED=true rules fire.

ba_hide-current-carrier.reason: Always ON. Only IS ENABLED=true rules fire.

ba_AAH_CustomFields.reason: AAH and CONNECT tenants only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_QSValidateAccount.reason: USAA (QuickSilver) tenant only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_personalauto_validations.reason: GetQuoteApi/GQCustomApi source only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive HQX2/PAA gets OFF.

ba_requirevehcov.reason: BOLTAG GetQuoteApi vehicle coverage only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_limited-collision.reason: KRAFTLAKEX auto collision only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_applyd2cdefaults.reason: Progressive tenant rule explicitly serves false (PROGRESSIVEPL → variation=false). Progressive gets OFF.

ba_WCValidation.reason: No tenant rules but Workers Comp validation — commercial lines, not Progressive home.

ba_minimum-coverage-legislation.reason: No tenant rules but describes auto coverage legislation (PD field). Not a Progressive home field.

ba_auto_all_enums.reason: Auto enums for BOLT/SAIS/UNIFY/BOLTAG/USAA. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_validate-bi-consumer.reason: USAA and BOLTAG auto BI validation only. Auto field — not Progressive home.

ba_FarmersDeclineReason.reason: KRAFTLAKEX (Farmers) tenant only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_multi_lob.reason: Other tenants only (NATIONALCOVERAGE, BOLTAG, KRAFTLAKEX, etc). Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_morethan4vehicles.reason: Other tenants only (USAA, LIBERTYX, KRAFTLAKEX, VWCANADA). Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_progcauto.reason: Progressive Auto (PROGRESSIVECL) only — not Progressive Home (PROGRESSIVEPL). Fallthrough=false → Progressive Home gets OFF.

ba_clauto_umpd_policy_vehicle.reason: Auto UMPD — KRAFTLAKE tenant. Not a Progressive home field regardless of fallthrough.

show-vin-alert-and-require-vehicle-detai.reason: UNIFY/PROGRESSIVECLDHUB (auto) only, OFF in UAT/staging/production. Not Progressive home.

ba_D2CAPI.reason: BOLTAG and KRAFTLAKEX D2C API only. Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_D2CFlow_GetQuoteAPI.reason: Not found in LaunchDarkly snapshot — dead/removed flag.

NoReplacementCost.reason: Not found in LaunchDarkly — likely dead/removed flag.

ba_fullquote.reason: Other tenants only (NATGEN, USAA, BOLTACCESS, KRAFTLAKEX). Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF.

ba_futureyearbuilt.reason: USAA tenant only (Tenant in [USAA]). Fallthrough=false → Progressive gets OFF. IS ENABLED=false rules fire — but field is PlumbingUpdatedYear which is not a Progressive migration target.

ba_Progressive_FL.reason: Progressive tenant rule exists (PROGRESSIVEPL, PGRX). Always ON in all envs — conditions included, consider hardcoding true after team verification.

ba_FlooringComposition-display-field.reason: No tenant rules — global ON in all envs. Conditions included, consider hardcoding true after team verification.
